content.en:
"Next up is the last finale item - the Enlightenment Tree Seed on the Other Side!"

The auctioneer announced.

Wow!

A golden seed was suspended in a special vessel, completely encased in this vessel, and its energy could not be emanated.

But.

Many bone transformation realms can still be recognized, this is a real Enlightenment Tree Seed on the other side!

"The Enlightenment Tree Seed on the Other Side!"

Ye Tian didn't know what it was.

Of course, there are definitely not a few bone transformation realms that he doesn't know about as well.

So, the auctioneer will definitely introduce it.

At this time, the auctioneer introduced: "Presumably, some Heavenly Ancestors don't know what the Enlightenment Tree seed is on the other side, so I'll introduce it here. Once the seeds of the Enlightenment Tree are planted, they will gradually grow into the Enlightenment Tree of the Other Shore after special nourishment and protection. This kind of enlightenment and cultivation under the tree of enlightenment will greatly improve the efficiency, and every 10,000 primeval epochs of the Enlightenment tree on the other side will bear a fruit of enlightenment on the other side. Once you swallow the Enlightenment Fruit of the Other Shore, your comprehension will be terrifyingly enhanced, and you can easily comprehend an ancient technique to an unimaginable degree. It can be said that a Peer Enlightenment Fruit has a great chance of creating an ancient-level genius!"

"In addition to cultivating the ancient arts, it is very helpful to comprehend the Haven on the other side and the Golden Script on the other side. If you find a place where the Golden Text on the Other Side or the Haven on the Other Side is inherited, and you have no hope of passing the assessment, you can swallow the Enlightenment Fruit of the Other Side, and you can easily pass the assessment and get more Golden Text and Haven on the Other Side. "

"The value of this kind of Enlightenment Tree on the other side, many Heavenly Ancestors should understand, for a force or even a single Heavenly Ancestor, it is unimaginably high!"

The auctioneer kept talking, and many bone transformation realms gradually knew the value of this treasure.

"The other side of the Enlightenment Fruit!"

Ye Tian was also very interested.

Although he also has a talent for understanding, it doesn't help him much now.

As for the primeval-level ancestor-level comprehension talent, he hadn't encountered it yet!

Of course.

His own comprehension was terrifying, far surpassing other Heavenly Ancestors and even other primeval-level geniuses.

However, if there is the Enlightenment Fruit of the Other Shore, his comprehension will temporarily be raised to an even more terrifying level, and it will be very easy to comprehend the Haven on the Other Side, the Golden Script on the Other Side, and even the art of creating the Other Shore.

"It's a pity that the price of the Enlightenment Tree seeds on the other side is too terrifying, and I have no hope of winning the auction. Also, it takes a long time to gestation, and I don't have time to wait for it. It would take 100,000 primeval epochs to give birth to a Enlightenment Fruit on the other side, and with this time, I might be able to step into the Nine Bone Transformation Realm primitive-level geniuses, or even higher realms!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

Inside the hall.

A bit of bone transformation is talking about it.

"The Enlightenment Tree Seed on the other side, such a precious thing, which fool took it out and sent it to take it?"

"It should be a certain bone transformation realm who is very lucky, and he is not capable of planting the enlightenment tree on the other side, after all, if the enlightenment tree on the other side wants to cultivate, it is not something that a bone transformation realm can bear!"

"That's right, if you sell it privately, I'm afraid it's very dangerous, and you might be intercepted and killed. The Eternal Night Pavilion is powerful and has a profound heritage, but it will not covet the Enlightenment Tree Seeds on the other side, this is the safest way. "

"It's a pity that I can't afford to bid, otherwise I would have participated in the auction!"

The starting price of the Enlightenment Tree Seed on the other side is very high, 20 billion primary eternal ancient gold.

It can be said that without more than 100 billion primary eternal ancient gold, there is no need to think of bidding for it at all.

Ordinary forces can't afford to bid at all, and only those very powerful forces are qualified to participate in the auction.

Soon, about a dozen bone transformation realms participated in the auction, all of them were bone transformation realms sitting in the special private room, representing more than a dozen forces.

As for those bone transformation realms in the hall, they can only look at it.

30,000,000,000,000 Primary-Eternal Ancient Gold!

40,000,000,000,000,000,000,000,0

50,000,000,000,000,000,000,000,0

These forces bid frantically, and they don't regard the primary eternal ancient gold as a thing at all, but only as a number.

It didn't take long for the auction price of the Enlightenment Tree Seed on the other side to rise to 100 billion Primary-Grade Eternal Ancient Gold.

This number was already an astronomical number for many Bone Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestors.

After reaching the auction price of 100 billion primary eternal ancient gold, some forces have already given up, and those forces are really still competing, and every time the bidding is not very simple, and they will even hesitate.

It is estimated that they are also contacting the forces behind them to discuss whether to continue to increase prices.

As a result, each price increase takes a little time.

At last.

The Enlightenment Tree Seed on the other side was taken by a mysterious force at a transaction price of 138 billion primary eternal ancient gold.

With the last finale item being auctioned off, the auction ended.

Then.

Ye Tian came to the backstage of the Eternal Night Auction Pavilion under the leadership of the woman of the Nine Blood Transformation Realm to settle the auction items.

Canghe Zhu, the inheritance of Jinwen on the other side, and

Ye Tianyi got it one by one, and he also got hundreds of millions of primary eternal ancient gold.

"Big money!"

Ye Tian said with a smile.

......

After the auction of the Eternal Night Pavilion.

A bone metamorphosis departed.

And Ye Tian did not leave the Eternal Ancient Demon City.

He was going to comprehend the golden text on the other side in the Eternal Ancient Demon City to see what the mystery of the golden text on the other side was.

But.

Just as he was about to enlighten, a great battle broke out outside the Eternal Ancient Demon City.

Thundered!!!!

The terrifying battle fluctuations were far away, but they were transmitted to the Eternal Ancient Demon City.

"It should be after the auction is over, competing with each other for treasures?"

Ye Tian guessed.

At the time of the auction, no one in the Bone Transformation Realm dared not to give face to the Eternal Night Pavilion.

But the auction is over, and they have left the Eternal Ancient Demon City, so they are welcome!

"Go over and see the excitement!"

Ye Tian let one of his replica bodies go over to take a look.

And there is not only one bone transformation realm as curious as him, but they all have their own strength, otherwise they would not dare to go over.

Whew!!!

A metamorphosis spied from a considerable distance.

Ye Tian is also here.

At this time, he spied on the scenes of battles everywhere, including the battles of the Nine Bone Transformation Realms.

Soon.

One of the eight bone transformations was killed, and the body was taken away.

Time passes slowly.

These battles have also ended one by one, and there are quite a few fallen bone transformation realms, and there is even one who has been killed nine times bone transformation realms.

Ye Tian couldn't participate in this kind of battle, so he could only watch it from a distance.

"I'm in a premium room, so no one knows what I'm bidding on, otherwise I'm sure I'll be targeted. "

Ye Tian thought to himself.
